Localization.Description: PowerShell functions System.IO.Pipes.NamedPipeServerStream and System.IO.Pipes.NamedPipeClientStream were used to create a server that awaits a bind or reverse shell. This may indicate the use of Fuegoshell one-liners and creation of a remote shell to execute malicious commands via PowerShell.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A function for creation of a server that awaits a reverse shell was used on behalf of user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
A function for creation of a server that awaits a bind shell was used on behalf of user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
